His acknowledgment of my "reflective nature" feels quite validating, and it really solidifies my trust in his leadership for this project.

So, he's going to share this refined plan with Nakamura-san, Kato-san, Yoshida-san, and Sasaki-san next. That means the formal process for brainstorming is about to kick off.
